libraryPreparationPreflight.agent_guidance: Configure the generated/native test scaffold for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1 to pass native runtime system properties `-Dsun.misc.unsafe.memory.access=allow` and `-Dio.netty.tryReflectionSetAccessible=true`; do not keep this limited to only version 5.0.0. Tests can create `Vertx.vertx()`, start a loopback `HttpServer` on port 0, and exercise `WebClient`, forms, redirects, cookies/sessions, caching, JSON/body codecs, and streaming without external services.

input_evidence.name: issue
input_evidence.summary: #7998 [Automation] native-image run fails for io.vertx:vertx-web-client:5.0.1; label=fails-native-image-run; body_chars=8015

risks: The unsafe-access properties are tied to the Java 25/native-image plus Netty 4.2.x runtime behavior; local Gradle/native-image verification remains authoritative.
The artifact declares `vertx-auth-oauth2` as optional, so generated tests should avoid OAuth2-specific APIs unless a separate dependency is intentionally added.
libraryPreparationPreflight.summary: No extra dependency or Docker service is needed; meaningful Vert.x Web Client coverage can use an in-process Vert.x HTTP server, but 5.0.1 still resolves Netty 4.2.x and should carry the existing Java 25/native-image unsafe-access runtime properties.
